stemHtml: During the landing phase of flight, an aeroplane entering ground effect with a constant angle of attack will...

options.a: experience an increase in coefficient of lift and have a tendency to float.
options.b: require a gradual increase in the required thrust in order to avoid a hard landing.
options.c: indicate a higher airspeed and require more rudder for directional control.
options.d: experience an increase in induced drag and have a tendency to land short.
